# Learning Section Content: Create a Guide on using forms

It would be nice to cover multiple different field types and fieldsets.

I already created a short intro-article on forms:
https://neomjs.com/dist/production/apps/portal/#/learn/benefits.FormsEngine

I also created an example on nested lazy-loaded forms:
https://github.com/neomjs/neo/tree/dev/apps/form

Learning Section Content is written in markdown. To get the idea (including using code live-previews):
https://raw.githubusercontent.com/neomjs/neo/refs/heads/dev/resources/data/deck/learnneo/pages/benefits/FormsEngine.md
